task_completion.description: Fix the swapped latitude and longitude coordinates in coordinate_transform.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing coordinate_transform.py open in an editor or a terminal diff where the order of latitude and longitude has been corrected to the standard format.

task_completion.description: Fix the buffer distance unit in spatial_operations.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing spatial_operations.py where the buffer distance application has been modified to use meters instead of raw degrees (e.g., projecting before buffering or converting units).

task_completion.description: Fix the area calculation to use a projected CRS in area_calculator.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing area_calculator.py modified to project the geometry to a suitable Coordinate Reference System (CRS) before calculating the area, rather than calculating it on raw geographic degrees.

task_completion.description: Fix the exact floating-point comparison in topology_validator.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing topology_validator.py where an exact comparison to zero (== 0) for cross products has been replaced with a tolerance-based floating-point comparison (e.g., math.isclose or checking if the absolute value is less than a small epsilon).

task_completion.description: Fix the GeoJSON export format in geojson_exporter.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing geojson_exporter.py modified to wrap the exported array of features inside a standard GeoJSON 'FeatureCollection' object.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually fixed the pipeline logic rather than hardcoding the expected final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code changes should show modifications to variables, functions, or mathematical logic. There should be no hardcoded static GeoJSON strings or pre-computed area values bypassing the pipeline.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a genuine text editor or standard command-line tools to modify the code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the use of a recognizable text editor (like VS Code, vim, nano) or standard Unix commands (like sed, awk, or git apply) rather than echoing large blocks of text blindly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires fixing five specific bugs in the Python ETL pipeline at /home/ga/workspace/geospatial_pipeline/: 1) Swapped latitude/longitude coordinates in coordinate_transform.py. 2) Buffer distance incorrectly applied in degrees instead of meters in spatial_operations.py. 3) Area calculated on raw geographic degrees instead of a projected CRS in area_calculator.py. 4) Exact floating-point comparisons (== 0) for cross products in topology_validator.py. 5) Missing FeatureCollection wrapper around the exported array in geojson_exporter.py.
